chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُسَافِرِ يَدْخُلُ فِي صَلَاةِ الْمُقِيمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – The traveller enters into a Salāt of the staying-one

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/390)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/390)
text: الْمُسَافِرِ يُصَلِّي خَلْفَ الْمُقِيمِ قَالَ يُصَلِّي رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَ يَمْضِي حَيْثُ شَاءَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the traveller praying Salāt behind the staying one (non-traveller). Heasws said: ‘He should pray two Rak’at, and he can move (away) wherever he so desires to’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a traveler if he can perform Salah (prayer) behind a non-traveler. He (the Imam) said, ‘After performing two Rak‘at, he then can move away whenever he wants.’”
